basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Trainee Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with SSLC / VHSE PASS, PASS IN ITI, DIPLOMA PASS (ANY STREAM) (3 YEAR COURSE), B.Sc PASS (ANY STREAM) qualification can directly attend the interview on 12-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: SSLC / VHSE PASS, PASS IN ITI, DIPLOMA PASS (ANY STREAM) (3 YEAR COURSE), B.Sc PASS (ANY STREAM)
qualification.details: SSLC Trainee: SSLC / VHSE PASS ITI Trainee: PASS IN ITI Diploma Trainee: DIPLOMA PASS (ANY STREAM) (3 YEAR COURSE) Graduate Trainee: B.Sc PASS (ANY STREAM)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HLL Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 12-05-2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Trainee posts at HLL?
faq.answer: Candidates should have passed SSLC / VHSE, ITI, Diploma (any stream, 3-year course), or B.Sc (any stream) to be eligible for the respective trainee positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the HLL Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 30 years as of the specified dates in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Trainee positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 9,000/- to Rs. 12,500/- per month, with increments in subsequent years for some positions.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Trainee posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Trainee positions, with one vacancy for each specific trainee category.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for HLL Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Selection Test conducted by HLL Lifecare Limited.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Trainee posts are on a contractual basis with HLL Lifecare Limited.
